summary.en-US: Syncs LeetCode browser cookies to the VS Code LeetCode extension running on localhost.

description.en-US: Companion browser extension for LeetCode with Auth Sync. It sends your signed-in leetcode.com session cookie to the local VS Code extension listener on 127.0.0.1 so VS Code can reuse your browser session.

release_notes.en-US: Updates the LeetCode VS Code Auth Sync browser extension.
